original_query: SELECT SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY "DEPTNO", "SAL" ORDER BY "SAL" RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "COL1", SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY "SAL" ORDER BY "DEPTNO" RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "COL2", SUM("SAL") OVER (PARTITION BY "DEPTNO" ORDER BY "SAL" RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "COL3" FROM "EMP" WHERE "SAL" = 5000
rewritten_query: SELECT SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY "DEPTNO", "SAL" ORDER BY "SAL" RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "COL1", SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY "SAL" ORDER BY "DEPTNO" RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "COL2", SUM("SAL") OVER (PARTITION BY "DEPTNO" ORDER BY "SAL" RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "COL3" FROM "EMP" WHERE "SAL" = 5000
